summary: Completed frontend testing of multi-part website enhancement for fixitbay.net. Tested contact form, JSON-LD schemas, H2 headings, StickyCTA mobile bar, and noindex meta tag.

issues: BlogFAQ H2 category headers (Refrigerator Repair Tips, Washer & Dryer Repair Tips, Dishwasher Repair Tips, General Appliance Tips) are NOT rendered as H2 elements. The page has filter buttons but not dedicated H2 section headers.

action_items: BlogFAQ page requirement: The /blog-faq route redirects to /blog. If H2 category headers are required, they need to be added to the /blog page or the BlogFAQPage component should be used at a different route.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major frontend features tested and working. Fixed /llm-info noindex issue by adding noindex: true to routeMeta in index.html. The /blog-faq redirects to /blog - if dedicated H2 category headers are required, this routing needs adjustment.

contact_page.details: Contact form section with name input, phone input, appliance select, message textarea, and submit button with #FF5722 background all present and functional. Hero CTA buttons (Call, Book) found.

reviews_page_schema.details: LocalBusiness schema with aggregateRating found. ratingValue: 4.9, reviewCount: 90

brands_page_schema.details: BreadcrumbList schema with 2 items found. ItemList schema with 14 brand items found. FAQPage schema with 5 questions found. LocalBusiness aggregateRating correct (4.9/87)

unified_footer.details: Privacy policy link with href='/privacy-policy' found (not /privacy)

sticky_cta_mobile.details: Mobile bottom bar with 3 buttons (Call, Book, Text) found with correct hrefs and SVG icons

commercial_refrigerator.details: H2 headings found including 'Commercial Refrigerator Brands We Service', 'Common Commercial Fridge Problems', 'Why Restaurants Trust FixitBay'

commercial_dryer.details: H2 headings found with unique content about gas/electric dryers, gas valve, heating element

commercial_oven.details: H2 headings found including 'Combi Oven & Pizza Oven Specialized Repair', 'Commercial Oven Types We Repair'

maintenance_hub.details: H2 headings found including 'Why Regular Maintenance Matters', 'Maintenance Plans & Pricing'

llm_info_noindex.details: Added noindex: true to routeMeta for /llm-info in index.html. Meta robots now shows 'noindex, follow'

blog_faq_h2_headers.details: /blog-faq redirects to /blog. The /blog page has filter buttons for categories but does NOT have dedicated H2 category headers (Refrigerator Repair Tips, etc.)
